Package org.rodinp.internal.core

Class AttributeType<V>

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.internal.core.AttributeType<V>
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<AttributeType<V>>, IAttributeType, IContributedItemType
Direct Known Subclasses:
AttributeType.Boolean, AttributeType.Handle, AttributeType.Integer, AttributeType.Long, AttributeType.String
public abstract class AttributeType<V> extends Object implements IAttributeType, IContributedItemType, Comparable<AttributeType<V>>
Implementation of attribute types.

    • isUbiquitous

      public boolean isUbiquitous()
      Description copied from interface: IAttributeType
      Returns whether this attribute type is ubiquitous.

      Ubiquitous element types can have any parent type.

      Specified by:
      isUbiquitous in interface IAttributeType
      Returns:
      true if ubiquitous, false otherwise

    • getElementTypes

      public InternalElementType<?>[] getElementTypes()
      Description copied from interface: IAttributeType
      Returns the types of internal elements that can carry an attribute of this type.
      Specified by:
      getElementTypes in interface IAttributeType
      Returns:
      the types of element that can carry an attribute of this type

    • isAttributeOf

      public boolean isAttributeOf(IInternalElementType<?> elementType)
      Description copied from interface: IAttributeType
      Tells whether an attribute of this type can be carried by an element of the given type.
      Specified by:
      isAttributeOf in interface IAttributeType
      Parameters:
      elementType - an internal element type
      Returns:
      true iff an element of the given type can carry an attribute of this type
